name: ちゃいけない
description: Must not do something; prohibition in casual spoken Japanese

name: だ・です
description: Copula meaning 'to be' (am, is, are, were); used to state facts or descriptions

name: だけ
description: Only, just, as much as; indicates limitation or restriction

name: だろう
description: I think, it seems, probably; expresses probability or seeks confirmation (casual)

name: で
description: Particle indicating location of action, means/method, or material used

name: でも
description: But, however; conjunction used to contrast or contradict previous statement

name: でしょう
description: I think, it seems, probably; expresses probability or seeks confirmation (polite)

name: どんな
description: What kind of, what sort of; interrogative word asking about type or nature

name: どうして
description: Why, for what reason; interrogative word asking for cause or reason

name: どうやって
description: How, in what way, by what means; interrogative asking about method or procedure

name: が
description: Subject marker particle; also conjunction meaning 'however' or 'but'

name: があります
description: There is, exists; used for non-living things and abstract concepts

name: がほしい
description: To want something; expresses desire for objects or things

name: がいます
description: There is, exists; used for living things like people and animals

name: ほうがいい
description: Had better, it'd be better to, should; gives advice or recommendations

name: い-adjectives
description: I-adjectives that end in い and conjugate by changing the い ending

name: 一番
description: The most, the best; superlative marker indicating highest degree

name: 一緒に
description: Together; indicates doing something with someone else

name: いつも
description: Always, usually, habitually; indicates regular or constant occurrence

name: じゃない
description: To not be (am not, is not, are not); negative form of だ in casual speech

name: か
description: Question particle placed at end of sentence to form questions

name: か～か
description: Or; presents alternatives or choices between options

name: から
description: Because, since, from; indicates reason/cause or starting point

name: 方
description: Way of doing something, how to do; indicates method or manner

name: けど
description: But, however, although; casual conjunction for contrast (short form of けれども)

name: けれども
description: But, however, although; formal conjunction used to show contrast or contradiction

name: まだ
description: Still, not yet; indicates continuation of state or incomplete action

name: まだ～ていません
description: Have not yet done something; indicates incomplete action up to present

name: まで
description: Until, as far as, to (an extent); indicates endpoint in time or space

name: 前に
description: Before, in front of; indicates temporal precedence or spatial position

name: ませんか
description: Would you, do you want to, shall we; polite invitation or suggestion

name: ましょう
description: Let's, shall we; volitional form expressing suggestion or invitation

name: ましょうか
description: Shall I; used to offer help or suggest doing something for someone

name: も
description: Too, also, as well; particle indicating addition or inclusion

name: もう
description: Already, anymore, again, other; indicates completion or change of state

name: な-adjectives
description: Na-adjectives that require な when modifying nouns directly

name: なあ
description: Sentence-ending particle expressing confirmation, admiration, or emotional emphasis

name: ないで
description: Without doing something; indicates performing one action without doing another

name: ないでください
description: Please don't do; polite negative request or prohibition

name: ないといけない
description: Must do, have an obligation to do; expresses necessity or duty

name: なくてもいい
description: Expresses that something is not necessary or that you don't have to do something

name: なくちゃ
description: Casual form expressing necessity or obligation; must do, need to, gotta do

name: なくてはいけない
description: Expresses strong necessity or obligation; must do, need to do

name: なくてはならない
description: Expresses strong necessity or obligation; must do, need to do (formal)

name: なる
description: Expresses change of state or transformation; to become

name: んです
description: Explanatory form used to explain something or add emphasis to a statement

name: ね
description: Sentence-ending particle seeking agreement or confirmation; isn't it? right?

name: に
description: Particle indicating destination, location, time, or indirect object; in, at, on, to

name: にいく
description: Expresses going somewhere to do something; go to do

name: にする
description: Expresses making a decision or choice; to decide on

name: に/へ
description: Particles indicating direction or destination; to (indicates direction/destination)

name: の
description: Possessive particle connecting nouns to show ownership or relationship

name: のです
description: Explanatory form used to explain something or add emphasis (formal version of んです)

name: のが下手
description: Expresses being bad at doing something or lacking skill in an activity

name: のが上手
description: Expresses being good at or skilled in doing something

name: のが好き
description: Expresses liking to do something or enjoying an activity

name: の中で[A]が一番
description: Expresses superlative comparison; A is the most/best among a group

name: ので
description: Expresses reason or cause; because of, given that, since

name: お/ご
description: Honorific prefixes used to make words more polite or respectful

name: を
description: Object marker particle indicating the direct object of a transitive verb

name: をください
description: Polite request form asking for something; please give me

name: しかし
description: Conjunction expressing contrast or opposition; but, however

name: それから
description: Conjunction indicating sequence or continuation; and then, after that, since then

name: そして
description: Conjunction connecting sentences or clauses; and then, thus, and now

name: すぎる
description: Expresses excess or going beyond a normal degree; too much

name: たことがある
description: Expresses past experience; to have done something before

name: たい
description: Expresses desire or want; want to do something

name: たり～たり
description: Lists examples of actions or states; do such things as A and B

name: てある
description: Expresses a resulting state from a completed action; is/has been done

name: ている
description: Expresses ongoing action or current state; progressive or continuous aspect

name: てから
description: Expresses sequence of actions; after doing something

name: てください
description: Polite request form; please do something

name: てはいけない
description: Expresses prohibition; must not, may not, cannot do something

name: てもいいです
description: Expresses permission; it's OK to, it's alright to, may I

name: と
description: Particle meaning 'and', 'with', or 'as'; connecting particle for nouns

name: とき
description: Expresses time or occasion; when, at the time when

name: とても
description: Adverb expressing high degree; very, awfully, exceedingly

name: つもり
description: Expresses intention or plan; plan to, intend to

name: は
description: Topic marker particle indicating the topic or theme of a sentence

name: は〜より・・・です
description: Comparative structure expressing that A is more something than B

name: はどうですか
description: Used to ask for opinions or suggestions about something, meaning 'how about' or 'how is'. Often used when making suggestions or asking for evaluations.

name: や
description: Connecting particle used to list items in a non-exhaustive way, meaning 'and' or 'or'. Implies there are other items not mentioned in the list.

name: よ
description: Sentence-ending particle used for emphasis or to assert information. Indicates the speaker wants to inform or convince the listener of something.

name: より～ほうが
description: Comparative pattern meaning '[A] is more than [B]'. Used to compare two things and indicate which one has more of a certain quality.
